calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Linda Reyes, Esq. represented Plaintiff Bernal Housing Associates and John E. Stringer, Esq. specially appeared for Defendant Ublanca Marie Washington. The case settled per written stipulation of the parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ublanca Marie Washinton appeared in propria persona 261-1593, demurring party

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT UBLANCA MARIE WASHINGTON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled, 5 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN CHAMBERS. (DEW/301/CW) Reporter: Candace Yount, #2737
